com.mentor.chs.plugin.table

Interface IXTable

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXPlugin
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXFunctionDesignTable, IXHarnessTable, IXIntegratorTable, IXLogicTable, IXStyleableTable

    @NotToBeImplementedDirectly
public interface IXTable
extends IXPlugin
    Interface to represent a table plug-in. Table plug-ins should not directly implement this interface, but the sub interfaces of this interface.
    Since:
    July 09, 2007
    Version:
    1.0

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.Class<? extends IXObject> getTableContext()
      Class of the supported entity of the table plug-in.
      void initialize(IXObject xObject)
      Method to initialize a table plug-in.
      IXTableData populate(IXObject xObject)
      Method to obtain a table data model from table plug-in.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • getTableContext

        java.lang.Class<? extends IXObject> getTableContext()
        Class of the supported entity of the table plug-in. Every entity in Capital like Connector, Harness, Splice etc is exposed via a proxy object of Extensibility. This method should return the Class of the proxy object of the supported entity. All proxy objects are subclass of IXObject. Refer the Extensibility document at <product_home>\doc\plugin\api\BusinessObjectsClassDiagram.png.
        Returns:
        Class The Class of the proxy object of the entity supported by table plug-in.

      • initialize

        void initialize(IXObject xObject)
        Method to initialize a table plug-in. It is executed during initialization and also during a table model refresh.
        Parameters:
        xObject - Proxy object of the supported entity of the table plug-in.

      • populate

        IXTableData populate(IXObject xObject)
        Method to obtain a table data model from table plug-in. This method is called during initialization of table plug-in and during refresh of the table model.
        Parameters:
        xObject - Proxy object of the supported entity of the table plug-in.
        Returns:
        IXTableData Object representing the table model as constructed by the table plug-in.
